description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring a light tan brick exterior and large, rectangular windows. The structure is composed of two main stories with an additional partial third level, and includes multiple green flat surfaces that resemble terraces or rooftop gardens. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some spanning vertically and others as large horizontal panes, providing ample natural light. The house has a prominent entryway with a glass door and a small overhang, and the ground level opens onto a spacious green patio area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living. The building appears to be constructed primarily from brick, glass, and concrete, with metal accents around the windows and doors.
description: A modern, cubic house with a flat roof, tan brick exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and green terrace areas. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a prominent glass entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with three vertical windows, a large horizontal window, and a glass entry door with a small overhang, as well as two green terrace areas.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear and side of the house, showing a mix of vertical and horizontal windows, a large green terrace, and the connection between the main structure and an attached lower section.
description_view_2: This view presents the back of the house, featuring large sliding glass doors opening onto a spacious green patio, and a clear view of the two main stories with a partial third level.
description_view_3: This view displays the opposite side of the house, with a single large window on the lower level and a mostly solid brick wall above, as well as the continuation of the green terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door with a small overhang, flush with the facade, and no visible steps or porch.
